nasb.text: The hand of the witnesses shall be first against him to put him to death, and afterward the hand of all the people. So you shall purge the evil from your midst.

esv.text: The hand of the witnesses shall be first against him to put him to death, and afterward the hand of all the people. So you shall purge the evil from your midst.

cnv.text: 見證人要先下手，然後眾民也下手，把他處死。這樣，你就把那惡從你中間除掉。

ccb.text: 证人要先扔石头，众人随后，这样就除掉了你们中间的罪恶。
